result.summary: notebooks.googleapis.com exposes a Google Cloud Notebooks HTTP API plus the `gcloud notebooks` CLI; both use Google Cloud authentication via OAuth2/ADC-style access tokens.
result.description: Google Cloud Notebooks provides managed notebook environments such as Agent Platform Workbench and related notebook resources in Google Cloud. It is part of Google Cloud's AI and notebook tooling for creating and managing notebook runtimes and resources.

gcp_oauth.label: Google Cloud access token / Application Default Credentials
gcp_oauth.setup: Use Google Cloud authentication to obtain an access token for your own project. The easiest path is to follow [Configure application default credentials](https://docs.cloud.google.com/gemini-enterprise-agent-platform/models/start/gcp-auth) or sign in with the Google Cloud CLI and create ADC with `gcloud auth application-default login`. The Notebooks API RPC docs state calls require the OAuth scope `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform`.
